zh.lifeSummary: William Carlyle House of Torthorwald, Second Lord of Carlyle是Sir John Carlyle 1st Earl Of Torthorwald和Mrs John Carlyle的兒子，於1466年出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾托瓦爾德。他於1487年7月12日之前與Janet Maxwell在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾度福利斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1525年5月28日在他的家鄉享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: William Carlyle House of Torthorwald, Second Lord of Carlyle是Sir John Carlyle 1st Earl Of Torthorwald和Mrs John Carlyle的儿子，于1466年出生在苏格兰度福利爾托瓦爾德。他于1487年7月12日之前与Janet Maxwell在英国苏格兰度福利爾度福利斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1525年5月28日在他的家乡享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Carlyle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cumberland) and Scottish (Dumfriesshire): variant of   Carlisle  .

variants.name: Carlisle
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from the Cumbrian city of Carlisle, in whose name Celtic cair ‘fort’ has been compounded with the Romano-British name of the settlement, Luguvalium.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: William Carlyle House of Torthorwald, Second Lord of Carlyle was born in 1466, in Torthorwald, Dumfriesshire, Scotland as the son of Sir John Carlyle 1st Earl Of Torthorwald and Mrs John Carlyle. He married Janet Maxwell before 12 July 1487, in Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 28 May 1525, in his hometown, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: William Carlyle House of Torthorwald, Second Lord of Carlyle est né en 1466, à Torthorwald, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, fils de Sir John Carlyle 1st Earl Of Torthorwald et Mrs John Carlyle. Il a épousé Janet Maxwell avant 12 juillet 1487, à Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 28 mai 1525, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: William Carlyle House of Torthorwald, Second Lord of Carlyle wurde 1466 in Torthorwald, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, als Sohn von Sir John Carlyle 1st Earl Of Torthorwald und Mrs John Carlyle geboren. Er hat vor 12. Juli 1487 in Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Janet Maxwell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 28. Mai 1525 im Alter von 59 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: William Carlyle House of Torthorwald, Second Lord of Carlyle è nato il nel 1466 nel Torthorwald, Dumfriesshire, Scotland come figlio di Sir John Carlyle 1st Earl Of Torthorwald e Mrs John Carlyle. Lui sposato Janet Maxwell prima del 12 luglio 1487, nel Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 28 maggio 1525, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Carlyle House of Torthorwald, Second Lord of Carlyleは1466年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアトルソルワルドでSir John Carlyle 1st Earl Of TorthorwaldとMrs John Carlyleの息子として生まれた。1487年7月12日以前にイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアダムフリーズでJanet Maxwellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1525年5月28日に故郷で59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Carlyle House of Torthorwald, Second Lord of Carlyle(은)는 1466년 스컷랜드 드프리실르 토르토월드에서 Sir John Carlyle 1st Earl Of Torthorwald(와)과 Mrs John Carlyle의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1487년 7월 12일 이전 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르 드프리스에서 Janet Maxwell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1525년 5월 28일 그의 고향에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Kingdom of Scot: Dumfries, Dumfreize, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: William Carlyle House of Torthorwald, Second Lord of Carlyle nasceu em 1466, em Torthorwald, Dumfriesshire, Scotland filho de Sir John Carlyle 1st Earl Of Torthorwald e Mrs John Carlyle. Ele casou-se com Janet Maxwell antes 12 de julho de 1487, em Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 28 de maio de 1525, em sua cidade natal, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: William Carlyle House of Torthorwald, Second Lord of Carlyle родился в 1466 г. в местности тортаурвалд, думфриессхир, Шотландия. Его родителей звали Sir John Carlyle 1st Earl Of Torthorwald и Mrs John Carlyle. Он женился на женщине по имени Janet Maxwell перед 12 июля 1487 г. в местности думфриесь, думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 28 мая 1525 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: William Carlyle House of Torthorwald, Second Lord of Carlyle nació en 1466, en Torthorwald, Dumfriesshire, Scotland como hijo de Sir John Carlyle 1st Earl Of Torthorwald y Mrs John Carlyle. Se casó con Janet Maxwell antes de 12 de julio de 1487, en Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 28 de mayo de 1525, en su pueblo, a la edad de 59 años.
